LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ENVIROMENTAL HEALTH, CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT AND ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO NOVTEX CORPORATION, JO-ANN SOTRES, INC. AND HANCOCK FABRICS, INC. (HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7 (F)). COUNSEL HAVING SUBMITTED A DECLARATION ADDRESSING THE COURT'S CONCERNS, COURT APPROVES THE SETTLEMENT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO SUPPLEMENT THE RECORD WITH ADDITIONAL FACTS TO JUSTIFY THE FEE REQUEST, INCLUDING: THE EXPERIENCE OF THE LAWYERS, THE TIME SPENT ON PARTICULAR TASKS AND COMPARABLE MARKET RATES. AS TO C.E.H., THE COURT NEEDS TO CONFIRM THAT ITS EMPLOYEES HAVE NO PERSONAL OR BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND MORE DETAIL ON JUST WHAT AND HOW MUCH C.E.H. SPENDS ON OTHER PUBLIC PROJECTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ENVIROMENTAL HEALTH, CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT AND ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO NOVTEX CORPORATION, JO-ANN SOTRES, INC. AND HANCOCK FABRICS, INC. (HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7 (F)).
APPEARANCES: ERIC S. SOMERS (LEXINGTON LAW GROUP, L.L.P., 415.759.4111) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COUNSEL HAVING SUBMITTED A DECLARATION ADDRESSING THE COURT'S CONCERNS, COURT APPROVES THE SETTLEMENT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO SUPPLEMENT THE RECORD WITH ADDITIONAL FACTS TO JUSTIFY THE FEE REQUEST, INCLUDING: THE EXPERIENCE OF THE LAWYERS, THE TIME SPENT ON PARTICULAR TASKS AND COMPARABLE MARKET RATES. AS TO C.E.H., THE COURT NEEDS TO CONFIRM THAT ITS EMPLOYEES HAVE NO PERSONAL OR BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND MORE DETAIL ON JUST WHAT AND HOW MUCH C.E.H. SPENDS ON OTHER PUBLIC PROJECTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED THIS DATE. (302/PJM/CK-X) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
